navTip.overview: What Ovo is seeing, thinking, and has queued right now

navTip.knowledge: Ovo's world model of you (entities + relations + profile)
navTip.process: What Ovo has done + the full causal chain of each inference
navTip.settings: Trust levels / privacy / AI backend / appearance
